channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Over 400 million unwanted and malicious emails were received by businesses in 2024
item.description: Report highlights rising cyber threats, and urges businesses to adopt advanced cybersecurity practices and foster a strong security culture.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Critics warn staff cuts at federal agencies overseeing US dams could put public safety at risk
item.description: Experts are warning that Trump administration workforce cuts at federal agencies overseeing U.S. dams are threatening their ability to provide reliable electricity, supply water to farmers and protect communities from floods.
item.dc:creator: Martha Bellisle, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Vance hopeful 'high-level' TikTok deal will be completed by early April
item.description: Vice President JD Vance said Friday that he was hopeful a deal to keep TikTok operating in the U.S. will be wrapped up by the early April deadline.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Governments won’t like this: encrypted messaging between Android and iOS devices coming, says GSMA
item.description: Imagine a world of the near future where Android and Apple iOS users can message one another with the certainty that their communication is secured against eavesdropping by end-to-end encryption (E2EE).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple Original Films will take you behind-the-scenes of a racing cockpit in this new thrilling F1 movie trailer
item.description: The trailer for the new Apple TV+ Original movie F1 shows off Brad Pitt and Damson Idris in a racing comeback story.
item.dc:creator: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke), TechRadar

item.title: Android 16 Beta 3 has arrived – here are the 4 features I think will be the most useful
item.description: Android 16 Beta 3 has arrived, bringing with it a handful of useful new features that aim to improve accessibility, make it easier to monitor the longevity of your phone, and keep local networks secure.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: IDC: 80% of companies plan to buy AI PCs this year
item.description: AI PCs could solve key issues organizations face when using cloud and data center AI instances, including cost, security, and privacy concerns, according to a new study by IDC Research. Nearly all organizations are already using or planning to use cloud-based AI platforms.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: US government warns Medusa ransomware has hit hundreds of critical infrastructure targets
item.description: Medusa ransomware has been around since 2021, targeting more than 300 critical infrastructure firms, CISA warns.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Silent Hill f will present players with 'a beautiful yet terrifying choice', and I can't wait to see what it is
item.description: Silent Hill f is the series' first game to be set in Japan, and its blend of beauty and terror looks absolutely horrifying.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: CAIOs are stepping out from the CIO’s shadow
item.description: In 2016, Andrew Ng, one of the best-known researchers in the field of AI, wrote about the benefits of establishing a chief AI officer role in companies, as well as the characteristics and responsibilities such a role should have.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Windows 10 Insider Previews: A guide to the builds
item.description: Microsoft never sleeps. In addition to its steady releases of major and minor updates to the current version of Windows 10, the company frequently rolls out public preview builds to members of its Windows Insider Program, allowing them to test out — and even help shape — upcoming features.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: IT leaders are driving a new cloud computing era
item.description: At fictional Tech Innovations Inc., a midsize software company, the rapid adoption of cloud technology was once seen as a transformative stepping stone toward agility and scalability.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Postponed NASA, Space X Falcon 9 mission rescheduled for Friday
item.description: NASA and SpaceX rescheduled the launch of their Falcon 9 rocket rescue mission to the International Space Station for Friday. They were unable to launch on Wednesday due to issues with equipment on the ground, and opted to scrub a Thursday launch attempt due to weather.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Google signals support for app store age verification law with changes
item.description: Google is pushing back against other major technology companies' efforts to put the responsibility of age verification on the app stores, arguing the onus is on both the stores and developers to boost children's safety.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Greece says ambitious Mediterranean power cable project is on track despite setbacks
item.description: ATHENS, Greece (AP) — The future of an ambitious electricity cable linking the power grids of Greece, Cyprus and Israel by the end of the decade is on track despite a series of setbacks, Greece’s Foreign Minister Giorgos Gerapetritis said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Meta to start testing crowd-sourced fact-checking, based on X example, next week
item.description: Facebook and Instagram parent company Meta Platforms Inc. said Thursday it will begin testing its crowd-sourced fact-checking program, Community Notes, on March 18. It will initially based on a ratings system used by Elon Musk's X. Meta ended its fact-checking program in January.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Copyright Office takes on the sticky issue of artificial intelligence
item.description: The U.S. Copyright Office completed the second of two studies of AI and copyrights as it dealt with whether you can copyright outputs created using AI. The post The Copyright Office takes on the sticky issue of artificial intelligence first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: How to deliver more secure capabilities to the warfighter, faster
item.description: Rethinking the delivery process for new capabilities is essential to put cybersecurity and the warfighter front and center. The post How to deliver more secure capabilities to the warfighter, faster first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump says TikTok deal is in the works. Here's where things stand with the company
item.description: In less than a month, TikTok could have one or a few new owners, be banned again, or simply receive another reprieve to continue operating in the United States.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages Monday that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk claimed that the social media platform was being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.” “We get attacked every day, but this was done with a lot of resources," Musk claimed in a post.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: New delivery robot can haul 2,200 pounds of your stuff
item.description: WeRide's unmanned electric delivery van, the Robovan W5, has 194 cubic feet of cargo space and can carry payloads up to about 2,205 pounds
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 16 hijacked browser extensions expose 3.2 million users
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy recommends deleting 16 browser extensions immediately in response to a report saying more than 3.2 million web users were affected by a security breach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
